Stages.Description:
Thin undead probes along the outer farms and pilgrim road.
Recommended squad: Swordsman + Archer.

Faster ghouls and tighter lane pressure on the raised road.
Recommended squad: 2x Swordsman, 1x Archer.
Dense mixed waves before the inner gate assault. Keep your line steady.
King's Road boss stage. Grave Lord entries begin toward the end of the battle.
Second district unlocked. Salt-soaked quays and chainlift chokepoints.
Flooded approaches slow pushes. Blight casters and heavy dead control the lane.
Armored waves force through broken cranes before the Grave Lord arrives.
Saltwake boss stage. Grave Lord entries begin toward the end of the battle.

Third district unlocked. Coal spurs favor split-brood screens, sapper dives, and brute-led pushes.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Archer + Siege Engineer or Halberdier.

Molten choke points, sapper flanks, and reinforced gates reward higher gate damage and disciplined deployment.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Shield Knight + Mage.
Steady heavy pushes, split-brood screens, and sapper feints test how well the caravan recovers between surges.
Emberforge boss stage. Split broods, sappers, and juggernauts hold the line until the Grave Lord joins the furnace push.
Fourth district unlocked. Warded barriers and purge bells set up blight fire behind sealed gates.
Caustic wash halls punish overcommits while curse support stacks behind the ritual lanes.
Plaguehouse barricades harden up while sappers and dread heralds try to crack the caravan from behind.
Ashen Ward boss stage. Purge cycles and sealed kill-box walls hold until the Grave Lord breaches the vault.

Frostbound scouts test the cliff road while raiders look for the war wagon axle.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Archer + Siege Engineer.

Narrow turns compress the climb under sleet while howlers and sappers chain quick dives.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Crossbowman + Halberdier.

Avalanche bells ring over the pass, and the crew must steady the shrine dais before the drifts crack open again.
Recommended squad: Battle Monk + Mage + Shield Knight.

MissionEvents.Title: Avalanche Shrine
MissionEvents.Summary: Hold the shrine dais long enough to silence the dead bells before the pass collapses again.
MissionEvents.RewardSummary: Reward: +12 courage and cleaner deck recovery once the bells go quiet.
MissionEvents.PenaltySummary: Risk: lose courage and card tempo if the shrine falls.

Stages.Description:
Watchfire bastions harden the lane while horns and raid ladders drive the climb.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Crossbowman + Battle Monk.
Thornwall Pass boss stage. Avalanche bells and watchfire volleys hold until the Grave Lord storms the gate.

Collapsed transepts and pew barricades turn the first nave into a slow grind under curse fire.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Mage + Archer.

Bone courts spill smaller dead while hexers and heralds hold the center under crumbling saints.
Recommended squad: Alchemist + Battle Monk + Shield Knight.

The choir loft rains curses over the aisle while reliquary bearers try to cross the nave under caravan cover.
Recommended squad: Crossbowman + Mage + Battle Monk.

MissionEvents.Title: Reliquary Bearers
MissionEvents.Summary: Hold the aisle long enough for the reliquary bearers to reach the war wagon.
MissionEvents.RewardSummary: Reward: a repair burst and escort reinforcement once the relics clear the nave.
MissionEvents.PenaltySummary: Risk: the war wagon takes a direct hit if the escort lane collapses.

Stages.Description:
Relic vault stairs narrow the line into a ceremonial kill zone guarded by elite undead and curse engines.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Shield Knight + Mage.
Hollow Basilica boss stage. Reliquary flares and censer clouds hold until the Grave Lord claims the high altar.

The first plank roads sink under shambling dead and rot mist while the caravan tests the bog line.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Siege Engineer + Archer.

Flooded pews and bell wakes narrow the lane while curse support stacks behind the mire dead.
Recommended squad: Battle Monk + Mage + Shield Knight.

A chained plague ferry drags the fight into a soaked choke point full of split-brood and blight fire.
Recommended squad: Alchemist + Crossbowman + Shield Knight.

Deep mire drag, plague bells, and endless drift pools force a patient advance against attrition-heavy pressure.
Recommended squad: Siege Engineer + Battle Monk + Mage.
Mire of Saints boss stage. Plague fog and chapel bells roll until the Grave Lord rises at the drowned altar.

Charred shelters and open lanes force quick answers to raider probes and horn-led rushes.
Recommended squad: Cavalry Rider + Archer + Shield Knight.

Open ground and cinder wind favor fast raiders, howler signals, and long flanking dives.
Recommended squad: Cavalry Rider + Crossbowman + Battle Monk.

Roving siege tents and breach crews turn the lane into a tempo fight over repeated dives.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Battle Monk + Cavalry Rider.

The redoubt burns hot with horn relays and rider pressure that punish any stalled push.
Recommended squad: Cavalry Rider + Battle Monk + Crossbowman.
Sunfall Steppe boss stage. Fire lines and horn relays pound the lane until the Grave Lord charges out of the warcamp.

The timber edge closes in with ambush packs, snare hazards, and curse-lit brush.
Recommended squad: Crossbowman + Mage + Shield Knight.

The circle grounds the fight under hex support and repeated flank dives from the treeline.
Recommended squad: Mage + Battle Monk + Crossbowman.

A cursed timber road turns every stall into an ambush window for raiders and hexers.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Mage + Shield Knight.

Every advance through the grove is punished by snare roots, curse fire, and hidden breach teams.
Recommended squad: Battle Monk + Crossbowman + Halberdier.
Gloamwood Verge boss stage. Thorn snares and witchfire close the lane until the Grave Lord rises in the heart circle.

The outer bridge forts lock the lane under mixed support fire and heavy breach pressure.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Crossbowman + Battle Monk.

Collapsed walls and siege rubble force a grinding advance against mixed command waves.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Siege Engineer + Mage.

Gatehouse towers and command relays stack pressure while the breach crew tries to crack the crownward wall.
Recommended squad: Shield Knight + Battle Monk + Crossbowman.

MissionEvents.Title: Breach Crew
MissionEvents.Summary: Keep the charge line clear long enough for the crew to break the crownward gate braces.
MissionEvents.RewardSummary: Reward: direct gatehouse damage when the breach charge lands.
MissionEvents.PenaltySummary: Risk: the gatehouse regains footing and hull if the charge fails.

Stages.Description:
The inner ring tightens into a final attrition line where heralds, hexers, and raiders converge.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Mage + Battle Monk.
Crownfall Citadel boss stage. Mixed command waves and breach lines collapse into the final Grave Lord siege.

A late King's Road capstone where faster dead and curse fire return as an endgame remix of the first march.
Recommended squad: Crossbowman + Battle Monk + Shield Knight.

A late Saltwake capstone where drowned hulks and deck-side pressure come back as a full attrition gauntlet.
Recommended squad: Siege Engineer + Alchemist + Shield Knight.

A late Emberforge capstone where furnace hazards, split broods, and sapper dives all peak together.
Recommended squad: Halberdier + Siege Engineer + Battle Monk.

A late Ashen Ward capstone where purge hazards, hex pressure, and a failing seal circle define the final caravan push.
Recommended squad: Mage + Battle Monk + Shield Knight.

MissionEvents.Title: Purge Seal
MissionEvents.Summary: Hold the failing seal circle long enough to keep the containment grid from turning on the caravan.
MissionEvents.RewardSummary: Reward: courage surge and cleaner recovery when the seal stabilizes.
MissionEvents.PenaltySummary: Risk: lose card tempo if the seal fails under pressure.
